classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域为减速机外形与剖视尺寸图，包含轴向尺寸'L1'至'L10x45°'、直径尺寸'ΦD1'至'ΦD12'、安装相关尺寸'C4'、'C8'、'C9'、'ΦC3'、'ΦC5'等，并有剖面线、中心线、尺寸箭头和轮廓结构，属于机械结构尺寸表达。

text_annotations.correction_note: Added spacing to match visible label meaning: L9 depth.
OCR read H80; corrected from visible vertical diameter/tolerance callout ΦD8 H7.

terminology_notes: H7 and h7 are ISO tolerance classes, not numeric dimensions in this crop.
Symbolic dimensions such as L8, D7, C9 require the dimensional table for numeric values.
translation_notes: Diameter symbol ∅ normalized to Φ for consistency.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Visible OCR-supported mounting/shaft-side dimensions include symbolic diameters and axial lengths, but numeric table values are not present in the crop.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: OCR-supported shaft/interface callouts include ΦD1 h7, ΦD3 h7, ΦD4 h7, ΦD5, ΦD7, ΦD8 H7, ΦD12, L1, L3, L4, L5, L6, L8, L9 depth and L10×45° chamfer.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Overall length is represented by L8; outer diameter/envelope is represented by ΦD7. Numeric values are not specified in the visible crop.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector-side and C-series callouts are visible in the image, but usable OCR source IDs for those labels were not available in the provided OCR list segment.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Numeric dimensional table values are absent from the crop; several visible labels lack usable OCR source IDs in the supplied source list.

unresolved_items.item: Visible D6, L2, ΦD10, C-series and other right/lower callouts appear in the image but no usable OCR source_id was available in the provided OCR source list segment.
unresolved_items.reason: Cannot output annotations or records without referencing existing OCR source_ids.
Likely OCR noise or structural-line/shape misreads; not used as final engineering annotations.

classification.reason: 目标框内为减速机端面安装结构视图，包含方形法兰轮廓、中心孔、安装孔分布、引出线和尺寸代号'C2'、'ΦC1'、'C7'以及角度'45°'标注；结合完整源图标题'尺寸图 Dimensional Drawing'，属于机械安装与外形尺寸信息。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
